scripts.build: yarn generate:api && yarn generate:search && vite build
scripts.build:analyze: yarn generate:api && yarn generate:search && vite build --mode analyze
scripts.dev: yarn prepare:granularity && yarn generate:api && yarn generate:search && vite
scripts.test: yarn generate:api && yarn generate:search && vitest --config vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:run: yarn generate:api && yarn generate:search && vitest run --config vitest.config.ts
